instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement when the engine is not running.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject gear engagement when Engine_Running_Status equals FALSE.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Running_Status = FALSE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Engine_Running_Status = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Engine_Running_Status = FALSE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Status_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Engine_Running_Status = FALSE THEN Maintain_Neutral_State

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow gear engagement only when the brake pedal is pressed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall permit gear engagement when Brake_Pedal_Status equals Pressed.

L4_requirements: IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Brake_Signal_Fault = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released THEN Maintain_Neutral_State

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement when vehicle speed exceeds safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject gear engagement when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Max_Engage_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Max_Engage_Speed THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Max_Engage_Speed THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > Max_Engage_Speed AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Trigger_Safety_Warning

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement when the system is in diagnostic mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit gear engagement when Diagnostic_Mode equals Active.

L4_requirements: IF Diagnostic_Mode = Active THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Diagnostic_Mode = Inactive THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Diagnostic_Mode = Active AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Diagnostic_Mode = Active THEN Maintain_Neutral_State
IF Diagnostic_Mode = Active AND Fault_Status = Critical THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Alert

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement when the gear position sensor reports an invalid state.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject gear engagement when Gear_Position equals Unknown_State.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Position = Unknown_State THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Gear_Position != Unknown_State THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Gear_Position = Unknown_State AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Gear_Position_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Gear_Position = Unknown_State THEN Maintain_Neutral_State

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement during ECU startup.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable gear engagement when TCU_State equals Startup.

L4_requirements: IF TCU_State = Startup THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF TCU_State = Normal_Operation THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF TCU_State = Startup AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF TCU_State = Startup THEN Maintain_Neutral_State
IF TCU_State = Initialization THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement during CAN communication faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit gear engagement when CAN_Communication_Fault equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = FALSE THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF CAN_Communication_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Neutral_State
IF Communication_Status = Lost THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Code

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement when multiple sensor faults occur.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit gear engagement when more than one sensor fault is active.

L4_requirements: IF Sensor_Fault_Count > 1 THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Sensor_Fault_Count <= 1 THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Sensor_Fault_Count > 1 AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Multiple_Faults = TRUE THEN Maintain_Neutral_State
IF Fault_Status = Critical THEN Trigger_Fault_Code

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement when engine speed exceeds safe limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject gear engagement when Engine_Speed exceeds Max_RPM.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Speed > Max_RPM THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Engine_Speed <= Max_RPM THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Engine_Speed > Max_RPM AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Engine_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Engine_Speed > Critical_RPM THEN Trigger_Engine_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement during limp-home mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable gear engagement when TCU_State equals Limp_Mode.

L4_requirements: IF TCU_State = Limp_Mode THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF TCU_State != Limp_Mode THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF TCU_State = Limp_Mode AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Limp_Mode = TRUE THEN Maintain_Neutral_State
IF System_Reset = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement when throttle demand is high.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject gear engagement when Throttle_Position exceeds Throttle_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Throttle_Position <= Throttle_Limit THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Throttle_Position > Throttle_Limit AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Throttle_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Throttle_Position > Critical_Throttle THEN Trigger_Safety_Alert

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement when clutch pressure is insufficient.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit gear engagement when Clutch_Pressure falls below Pressure_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Clutch_Pressure < Pressure_Limit THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Clutch_Pressure >= Pressure_Limit THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Clutch_Pressure < Pressure_Limit AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Clutch_Pressure_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Clutch_Pressure < Critical_Pressure THEN Trigger_Fault_Code

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement during high transmission temperature.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable gear engagement when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Max_Temp.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Max_Temp THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Critical_Temp THEN Trigger_Thermal_Protection

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement when reverse is requested at high speed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject reverse engagement when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Reverse_Safe_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Reverse_Safe_Speed AND Shift_Request = Reverse THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed <= Reverse_Safe_Speed THEN Allow_Reverse_Engagement
IF Vehicle_Speed_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Vehicle_Speed > Reverse_Safe_Speed THEN Maintain_Neutral_State
IF Vehicle_Speed > Critical_Speed THEN Trigger_Safety_Alert

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement when the shift actuator is not ready.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable gear engagement when Shift_Actuator_Status equals Not_Ready.

L4_requirements: IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Not_Ready THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Ready THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Not_Ready AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Shift_Actuator_Fault = TRUE THEN Maintain_Neutral_State
IF Shift_Actuator_Status = Fault THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement when system voltage is below limits.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall reject gear engagement when Battery_Voltage falls below Voltage_Limit.

L4_requirements: IF Battery_Voltage < Voltage_Limit THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Battery_Voltage >= Voltage_Limit THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Battery_Voltage < Voltage_Limit AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Voltage_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Battery_Voltage < Critical_Voltage THEN Trigger_Power_Fault

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent gear engagement during transmission faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable gear engagement when Transmission_Fault_Status equals TRUE.

L4_requirements: IF Transmission_Fault_Status = TRUE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Transmission_Fault_Status = FALSE THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Transmission_Fault_Status = TRUE AND Shift_Request = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
IF Transmission_Fault_Status = TRUE THEN Maintain_Neutral_State
IF Fault_Status = Critical THEN Trigger_Diagnostic_Code

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall ensure safe gear engagement only when all safety conditions are satisfied.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall allow gear engagement when engine running, brake applied, and speed below threshold.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_Running_Status = TRUE AND Brake_Pedal_Status = Pressed AND Vehicle_Speed <= Max_Engage_Speed THEN Gear_Engagement = Enabled
IF Engine_Running_Status = FALSE THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Brake_Pedal_Status = Released THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Vehicle_Speed > Max_Engage_Speed THEN Gear_Engagement = Disabled
IF Any_Safety_Fault = TRUE THEN Reject_Shift_Request
